meta.phase-name: Visual composer inline editing and publish workflow

highlights.item: The composer drawer now uses a split preview-plus-controls shell so the preview becomes the primary editing surface instead of a passive byproduct of the page form.
Selection is mirrored between the preview canvas and Structure, with clear selected-block outline treatment and shared quick actions for add above/below, duplicate, delete, and hide/show.

The preview now supports inline editing for the MVP text lanes the composer already owns directly: service-grid heading and intro copy, row copy, CTA copy and labels, inline pricing plans, content-slot text, and custom HTML snippets.
Draft switching and create-draft flows remain compact in the header while the publish tab now shows changed-block count, page workflow state, and an actionable validation summary.
Responsive preview controls now support desktop, tablet, and mobile widths without mutating stored page content.

verification.command: npm.cmd exec eslint src/components/admin-impersonation/PageComposerDrawer.tsx src/components/admin-impersonation/PageComposerPreview.tsx src/lib/pages/pageComposer.ts src/lib/pages/pageComposerBlockRegistry.ts src/lib/pages/pageComposerReusableBlocks.ts src/lib/pages/pageComposerLexical.ts tests/e2e/page-composer.e2e.spec.ts
set PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3111 && npm.cmd exec -- playwright test tests/e2e/page-composer.e2e.spec.ts --config=playwright.local.config.ts

next.item: The next composer stream is phase `17`: reusable semantics, dynamic blocks, container slot behavior, and Custom HTML.
